title: ML Foundations Track
description: A guided introduction from linear models to neural networks. Weekly problem sets and a small capstone — no prior ML required.

title: AI Safety Fundamentals
description: A structured reading group on the alignment problem, following a curated syllabus from RLHF to scalable oversight, with weekly discussion.

title: LLM Engineering Workshop
description: Hands-on sessions on prompting, retrieval, tool use, and evaluation. Build and ship a small agent by the end of the series.

title: Advanced Paper Circle
description: We read one recent paper a week from top venues, rotate who presents, and reproduce a key result each month.

title: From Notebook to Production
description: A practical track on packaging, serving, and monitoring models — Docker, CI, and lightweight MLOps for student projects.

title: Math for ML Refresher
description: A gentle refresher on the linear algebra, calculus, and probability you actually need — drop in whenever you like.
